title: draba caroliniana var. micrantha
intro: Draba caroliniana var. micrantha, also known as Carolina draba, is a small, annual or biennial plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat colds, coughs, and sore throats due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Draba caroliniana var. micrantha include its potential to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and may be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
